summary: Backend testing of R2 Image Upload Fix - All 4 upload endpoints verified. All endpoints now upload to Cloudflare R2 storage and return R2 URLs (https://images.tilestation.co.uk/...).
critical_code_review_comments: All upload endpoints now correctly use R2 storage instead of local storage
Endpoints properly return 'storage': 'r2' to indicate cloud storage usage
All uploaded images are accessible via the R2 CDN (https://images.tilestation.co.uk/...)
Local fallback is still implemented in case R2 is unavailable
seed_data_creation: None - test images created dynamically using PIL
context_for_next_testing_agent: R2 image upload fix verified. All 4 upload endpoints (/api/upload-image, /api/website-admin/upload-image, /api/website-admin/upload-banner-image, /api/supplier-sync/upload-product-image) now upload to Cloudflare R2 storage. Images are accessible via https://images.tilestation.co.uk CDN.

fix_verification.issue: Images uploaded were saved locally instead of to R2 storage, causing them not to appear on shop
fix_verification.fix_applied: Updated all 4 upload endpoints to use R2 storage with local fallback
fix_verification.verification_method: Uploaded test images via each endpoint and verified R2 URLs returned and accessible
fix_verification.result: All endpoints now upload to R2 and return R2 URLs (https://images.tilestation.co.uk/...)
